project_privacy_data_flows.description: User requests password recovery email. Email sent to auth.streetwriters.co to trigger recovery email. Rate-limited to prevent abuse (3-minute cooldown).

flow_steps.code: const sendRecoveryEmail = async () => { const values = formRef.current.getValues(); await db.user.recoverAccount(values.email.toLowerCase()); }
flow_steps.details: User enters email address and requests recovery. Email validated and sent to auth server.
Email address sent to auth.streetwriters.co to trigger password recovery email.
Client-side rate limiting prevents sending more than one recovery email per 3 minutes.
Last recovery email timestamp stored in MMKV for rate limiting across sessions.
